global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a focus on financial clarity.
global.main_message: This ad promotes financial transparency with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A smooth, solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A bold, prominent logo at the top, featuring the text 'VaultRun' in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: A medium-sized text in the center that reads 'Your money, clearer' in a modern font.

elements.label: Sub-message text
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message stating 'No hidden fees' in a clean, readable style.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in the background, adding a modern touch to the overall design.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer No hidden fees
